translations.Restored your queue with {count} tracks: Restored your queue with {count} tracks where you left off.
translations.Continue listening and discover your aud: Continue listening and discover your audio library.
translations.Built-in Favorites and playlists you cre: Built-in Favorites and playlists you create.
translations.Explore artists, genres, folders, and fa: Explore artists, genres, folders, and favorites.
translations.Pick a track from Home, Browse, or your: Pick a track from Home, Browse, or your playlists.
Or open Home to continue listening.
Manage folders and scan your audio.
translations.Choose folders to scan, then index your: Choose folders to scan, then index your audio.
translations.Add folders from your Files, scan them,: Add folders from your Files, scan them, then listen on Home and Music.
translations.Your audio stays in Files. Add folders h: Your audio stays in Files. Add folders here so AudioCheck knows what to scan.
translations.Pick a folder in the Files app. Nothing: Pick a folder in the Files app. Nothing is copied — AudioCheck only indexes what is already there.
translations.Music and audiobooks are separate: add o: Music and audiobooks are separate: add one folder for albums, another for books (or chapter folders like CD1 and CD2).
translations.Albums, singles, and playlists from a fo: Albums, singles, and playlists from a folder in Files.
translations.Books and chapter folders (MP3, M4B, and: Books and chapter folders (MP3, M4B, and more).
translations.Let AudioCheck guess from file type, len: Let AudioCheck guess from file type, length, and genre.
translations.Use the buttons above to add a music or: Use the buttons above to add a music or audiobook folder from Files.
translations.Change the content type anytime. Audiobo: Change the content type anytime. Audiobook folders include MP3 chapter sets; music folders include albums and singles.
translations.Add music folder or Add audiobook folder: Add music folder or Add audiobook folder — pick the matching folder in Files.
translations.Open Music or Audiobooks — listen to alb: Open Music or Audiobooks — listen to albums, playlists, and chapters.
translations.This folder was already added. Content t: This folder was already added. Content type updated to {kind}.
translations.Every folder you add appears here. Chang: Every folder you add appears here. Change the content type anytime.
translations.Use the buttons below to add a music or: Use the buttons below to add a music or audiobook folder from Files.
translations.Tap Scan now above if audio does not app: Tap Scan now above if audio does not appear after a moment.
translations.Access policy and defaults for AudioChec: Access policy and defaults for AudioCheck.
translations.Add a music folder in Library (set conte: Add a music folder in Library (set content type to Music) and scan.
translations.Add an audiobook folder in Library (set: Add an audiobook folder in Library (set content type to Audiobooks or Auto-detect) and scan.
translations.Audiobooks are detected from .m4b files,: Audiobooks are detected from .m4b files, long tracks, or audiobook genres. Add audio folders in Library and scan.
translations.You are not allowed to use AudioCheck ri: You are not allowed to use AudioCheck right now.
translations.You do not have access to AudioCheck. Yo: You do not have access to AudioCheck. Your account is not among the users or groups allowed to use this app. Ask a server or app administrator if you need access.
translations.Audio player failed to load. Reload the: Audio player failed to load. Reload the page.
This file may not play in your browser.
translations.May not play in this browser: May not play in this browser
translations.Background cron is not enabled on this s: Background cron is not enabled on this server. Use Scan now to refresh your library, or ask an administrator to enable system cron in Nextcloud settings.
translations.Add a folder in Library and scan to buil: Add a folder in Library and scan to build your collection.
Scan your library to find audio.
Open the Files app to pick a folder.
translations.Browse to the folder that contains your: Browse to the folder that contains your audio files.
translations.You are adding a folder to scan — not pi: You are adding a folder to scan — not picking a single song. The Nextcloud dialog uses a blue “Choose …” button at the bottom to confirm the folder.
translations.Browse to the folder with your audio (do: Browse to the folder with your audio (double-click folder rows to open them).
translations.Songs in the list only confirm you are i: Songs in the list only confirm you are in the right place — do not click them.
translations.Click the blue “Choose …” button at the: Click the blue “Choose …” button at the bottom (for example “Choose Music”). That selects the whole folder you are viewing.
translations.Shortcut: from the parent folder, single: Shortcut: from the parent folder, single-click the folder you want, then click “Choose …”.
translations.That is a file, not a folder. Open the f: That is a file, not a folder. Open the folder that contains it, then click the blue Choose … button at the bottom.
translations.AudioCheck indexes audio inside the fold: AudioCheck indexes audio inside the folder. Subfolders are included when enabled in Settings.
translations.Click Add folder, then browse to your au: Click Add folder, then browse to your audio in the Files picker.
translations.Open the folder with your audio. Do not: Open the folder with your audio. Do not click individual songs.
translations.Use the blue Choose … button at the bott: Use the blue Choose … button at the bottom of the dialog (for example “Choose Music”) to select the whole folder.
translations.Click Scan now. Your tracks appear on Ho: Click Scan now. Your tracks appear on Home, Music, and Audiobooks.
translations.Folders AudioCheck scans for music and a: Folders AudioCheck scans for music and audiobooks.
translations.Add a folder above to tell AudioCheck wh: Add a folder above to tell AudioCheck where your audio files live.
translations.AudioCheck will stop scanning this folde: AudioCheck will stop scanning this folder. Your files are not deleted.
translations.Folder added. Tap Scan now to index your: Folder added. Tap Scan now to index your audio.
translations.Use the folder picker from Files integra: Use the folder picker from Files integration.
translations.Your folder is saved. Tap Scan now if tr: Your folder is saved. Tap Scan now if tracks do not appear after a moment.
translations.Tell AudioCheck what lives in this folde: Tell AudioCheck what lives in this folder. You can change this later.
translations.All audio in this folder is treated as m: All audio in this folder is treated as music.
translations.All audio in this folder is treated as a: All audio in this folder is treated as audiobooks (including MP3 chapters).
translations.AudioCheck decides from file type, lengt: AudioCheck decides from file type, length, and genre.
translations.Content type updated. Re-scanning to aut: Content type updated. Re-scanning to auto-detect tracks…
translations.Choose whether each folder is music, aud: Choose whether each folder is music, audiobooks, or auto-detect. Your files stay in Files — nothing is copied.
translations.Add folder — pick a folder, then choose: Add folder — pick a folder, then choose Music, Audiobooks, or Auto-detect.
translations.Open Music, Audiobooks, or Home — play a: Open Music, Audiobooks, or Home — play albums, playlists, and chapters.
translations.Tip: use separate roots for music and au: Tip: use separate roots for music and audiobooks. Avoid nested folders that overlap (for example /Music and /Music/Albums).
translations.Add a folder below. AudioCheck will scan: Add a folder below. AudioCheck will scan it for music and audiobooks.
translations.Add folder — pick a folder in Files (use: Add folder — pick a folder in Files (use the blue Choose … button).
translations.Scan now — AudioCheck indexes audio insi: Scan now — AudioCheck indexes audio inside your folders.
translations.Open Music or Home — play albums, playli: Open Music or Home — play albums, playlists, and audiobooks.
translations.These folders are scanned for music and: These folders are scanned for music and audiobooks. Your files stay in Files — nothing is copied.
translations.Applied when you open AudioCheck. You ca: Applied when you open AudioCheck. You can also change volume in the mini player or Now playing.
translations.You can control playback without the key: You can control playback without the keyboard. Look for these controls:
translations.Play, pause, previous, next, seek, volum: Play, pause, previous, next, seek, volume, and open Now playing.
translations.Full player with cover, seek bar, shuffl: Full player with cover, seek bar, shuffle, repeat, speed, volume, queue, and chapters.
translations.Default speed, volume, and resume prefer: Default speed, volume, and resume preferences.
translations.Shortcuts work when no text field is foc: Shortcuts work when no text field is focused and no dialog is open.
translations.Restrict app access to allowed users and: Restrict app access to allowed users and groups
translations.Manage access policy and defaults in the: Manage access policy and defaults in the AudioCheck app settings.
translations.This list controls who can open AudioChe: This list controls who can open AudioCheck. Server administrators and app administrators always keep access.
translations.Restrict who may open the app: Restrict who may open the app
Type at least two characters to search.
translations.Only real Nextcloud user accounts can be: Only real Nextcloud user accounts can be selected.
translations.Search users to add as administrators: Search users to add as administrators
translations.When restriction is enabled, add at leas: When restriction is enabled, add at least one user or group.
translations.Could not resolve folder. Open the folde: Could not resolve folder. Open the folder in the picker, then use the blue Choose … button at the bottom.
Add a folder to index your audio files.
translations.Choose a folder from your files to index: Choose a folder from your files to index audio. Use Add folder above to get started.
translations.Automatic lists that stay in sync with y: Automatic lists that stay in sync with your library.
Named collections you create and edit.
translations.Group tracks in any order — for moods, a: Group tracks in any order — for moods, albums, or listening sessions.
translations.Star tracks in Now playing or Browse. Fa: Star tracks in Now playing or Browse. Favorites also appear in the Files app.
translations.No favorite tracks yet. Tap Favorite on: No favorite tracks yet. Tap Favorite on a track to add it here.
translations.Create a playlist to group your favorite: Create a playlist to group your favorite tracks.
translations.Create a playlist for your own collectio: Create a playlist for your own collections, or favorite tracks to fill Favorites.
Tracks you have marked as favorites.
translations.No favorite tracks yet. Use Favorite on: No favorite tracks yet. Use Favorite on a track to add it here.
translations.Favorite tracks from Now playing or Brow: Favorite tracks from Now playing or Browse. They also sync with the Files app.
Used when you start playing a new track.
No playlists yet. Create one first.
All tracks are already in the queue.
translations.Title: Title
translations.Relative path inside each user's Files h: Relative path inside each user's Files home (for example Music or Audiobooks).
No audio found in this folder.
translations.When enabled, opening a track continues: When enabled, opening a track continues from your saved position.
translations.Include files in subfolders when scannin: Include files in subfolders when scanning. Used for new library folders and the default folder.
translations.This folder is unavailable. Remove it or: This folder is unavailable. Remove it or restore access in Files.
translations.Add or remove folders to scan in the Lib: Add or remove folders to scan in the Library section.
translations.Usually plays in the browser: MP3, M4A,: Usually plays in the browser: MP3, M4A, M4B, AAC, OGG, Opus, WAV. FLAC, WMA, and AIFF may need another app or browser.
translations.Pick up where you left off. Tap a title: Pick up where you left off. Tap a title to load it, then press Play.
translations.Choose audio from Home or Browse to star: Choose audio from Home or Browse to start listening.
translations.Add folders in Library and scan to brows: Add folders in Library and scan to browse artists, genres, folders, and more.
translations.Scan in progress. Categories will appear: Scan in progress. Categories will appear when indexing finishes.
translations.Artist names appear here when your audio: Artist names appear here when your audio files include artist metadata. Try Folders or open Music to browse by album.
translations.Audiobooks with author metadata appear h: Audiobooks with author metadata appear here after scanning. Add .m4b files or long tracks in Library.
translations.Audiobook series tags appear here when y: Audiobook series tags appear here when your files include them.
translations.Genre tags appear here when your audio f: Genre tags appear here when your audio files include genre metadata.
translations.Folder groups appear after you add libra: Folder groups appear after you add library folders and scan.
translations.System tags from the Files app appear he: System tags from the Files app appear here when assigned to your audio files.
translations.Albums appear when your files include al: Albums appear when your files include album metadata, or switch to Tracks for every title.
translations.Every song in your library. Press Play o: Every song in your library. Press Play on a row to listen.
translations.Grouped by album when your files include: Grouped by album when your files include album tags. No tags? Use Tracks instead.
translations.Music grouped by the folders you added i: Music grouped by the folders you added in Library. Open a folder to see its tracks.
translations.Browse audiobook titles, folders, and bo: Browse audiobook titles, folders, and books.
translations.Author: Author
translations.Every audiobook in your library. Press P: Every audiobook in your library. Press Play on a row to listen.
translations.Grouped by book title when your files in: Grouped by book title when your files include album tags. No tags? Use Titles instead.
translations.Audiobooks grouped by the folders you ad: Audiobooks grouped by the folders you added in Library. Open a folder to see its titles.
translations.Books appear when your files include boo: Books appear when your files include book or album metadata, or switch to Titles for every file.
translations.All audio grouped by folder. Open a grou: All audio grouped by folder. Open a group to see its tracks and press Play on a row.
translations.Music grouped by artist tag. Open an art: Music grouped by artist tag. Open an artist to see their tracks.
translations.Tracks grouped by genre. Open a genre to: Tracks grouped by genre. Open a genre to browse and play.
translations.Audiobooks grouped by author. Open an au: Audiobooks grouped by author. Open an author to see their titles.
translations.Audiobook series from your file tags. Op: Audiobook series from your file tags. Open a series to see its titles.
translations.System tags from the Files app. Open a t: System tags from the Files app. Open a tag to see matching tracks.
